title: Astral Travel
description: A space exploration datapack with things
body:
# New Content
1. 3 New Planets
2. 1 New Ore
3. 1 New Gear Set
4. 4 New Block Sets
5. 2 Tiers of Rocket Ships
6. New Advancements
## Other
If you find bugs report them in the bug and issue reports channel in the discord
After im done with updating this i will release a guide for making addons that you can post in the discord
Polymer Autohost needs to be enabled for the texture pack to work
